## Example QuestionnaireResponse: Example EMS Questionnaire Response — Agency Custom Elements

Profile: [EMS Questionnaire Response — Custom Element Results](StructureDefinition-ems-questionnaireresponse.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ex-ems-questionnaireresponse
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[Example Agency Custom Data Elements](Questionnaire-ex-ems-questionnaire.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)agency-decon-01
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): [v2 Y/N Indicator: Y](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/v2/0136/index.html#v2-0136-Y) (Yes)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format



## Resource Content

```json
{
  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "ex-ems-questionnaireresponse",
  "meta" : {
    "profile" : ["https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ems-questionnaireresponse"]
  },
  "questionnaire" : "https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/Questionnaire/ex-ems-questionnaire",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/ex-ems-patient"
  },
  "encounter" : {
    "reference" : "Encounter/ex-ems-encounter"
  },
  "authored" : "2026-03-14T15:30:00-08:00",
  "item" : [{
    "extension" : [{
      "url" : "https://fhirems.github.io/fhirEMSCoreIG/StructureDefinition/ext-ems-custom-target",
      "valueString" : "UUID-PCR-2026-031400042-1"
    }],
    "linkId" : "agency-decon-01",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueCoding" : {
        "system" : "http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0136",
        "code" : "Y",
        "display" : "Yes"
      }
    }]
  }]
}

```
